name: read_file
description: Read the contents of a file. Returns the file content with line numbers.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to read

offset.description: Line number to start reading from (optional)

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read (optional)

name: write_file
description: Write content to a file. Creates or overwrites the file.

file_path.description: Absolute path to the file to write

content.description: Content to write to the file

dir_path.description: Absolute path to the directory to list

pattern.description: Optional glob pattern to filter files (e.g., '*.ts')

name: run_command
description: Run a shell command and return its output. Use with caution.

description.description: Brief description of what the command does

name: search_content
description: Search for a regex pattern in files within a directory.

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern to search for

path.description: Directory or file to search in

name: update_memory
description: Update the persistent project memory with new information learned about the codebase.

content.description: The updated memory content in Markdown format. This should include key facts, architectural patterns, or important file locations.

name: save_skill
description: Save a reusable skill or workflow pattern learned during task completion for future use.

name.description: Short, descriptive name of the skill (e.g., 'setup-elysia-cors')

description.description: What this skill does and when to use it.

steps.description: Step-by-step instructions or code snippets for this skill.

name: curate_skills
description: Trigger the Lulu Curator to analyze, merge, and prune the global skill library for better performance and quality.

reason.description: Why are you triggering curation? (e.g., 'Too many overlapping skills')

name: update_skills_batch
description: Overwrite the entire global skill library with a new, curated set of skills.
